acceptance_criteria.text: Operator records audit/ledger events for attention brief, consent policy updates, and paid action preflight.
proof: src/api/operator_api.py records operator_context_built, operator_consent_decision, and operator_paid_action_estimated.

acceptance_criteria.text: Audit events use the existing agent_action_ledger foundation with capability localos.operator; no new schema migration is introduced.
Web/API exposes a read-only recent Operator event list scoped by authenticated business access.
proof: The endpoint uses require_auth_from_request and verify_business_access.
list_operator_events filters by business, capability, and Operator event types.

acceptance_criteria.text: The /dashboard/operator surface shows a compact Operator journal.
proof: The page renders a Журнал Operator section with status, action key, timestamp, risk, and summary.

acceptance_criteria.text: Sprint 6 does not execute paid actions, call Apify, reserve or charge credits, generate AI content, or publish externally.
proof: Audit metadata records credit_charged, paid_actions_performed, external_calls_performed, and external_writes_performed as false.
No parser, Apify, AI generation, credit charging, parsequeue, or provider publication path was added.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_audit.py tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_consent_policy.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_attention.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
known_gaps: Sprint 6 does not execute paid actions, call Apify, charge credits, generate content, or publish externally by design.
